title: Clay Soldiers Remake
description: A data driven remake of the Clay Soldiers Mod
body:
**Clay Soldiers Remake** 

Clay Soldiers Remake is a data driven remake of the classic Clay Soldiers mod, bringing the miniature army-building experience to newer Minecraft versions. Just like the original, you can create tiny, customizable clay warriors and watch them battle in epic skirmishes - CSR has compatibility with datapacks, allowing you to easily add new or modify existing items and gear, that Clay Soldiers can wear.

List of all [Items](https://bumble-b33.github.io/csr-wiki-v2/wiki/default-items.html) Clay Soldiers can equip.

![Small Battle between Green and Purple Clay Soldiers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92838b2ed0ef2f2b935f9181ce476410ab2c0e8c.png)

![Clay Soldier with some basic equipment](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19ad4b2697d24226edf523bd596331bb9e238676.png)

![Clay Soldier working on a farm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60b657288491641152eae1dfe945bfe79047e44b.png)
